package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
)

// scenario for strconv_formatint_int64_cast_itoa: `strconv.FormatInt(int64(v), 10)` instead of `strconv.Itoa(v)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario643Positive(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, fmt.Sprintf("%d", value))
	}
	return out
}
